forward.note: Sequential ramp off $8.6m Q1; mobile/consumer 'insignificant by year-end'.

trail.val: 10kW all-GaN 800V-to-50V DC-DC at 98.5% peak efficiency, co-developed
3-phase architecture; in-rack GaN proof points Q1–Q2'27 (the gate to production revenue)

forward.note: The swing factor; no material AI-DC P&L until 2027, tied to NVDA Kyber/Rubin-Ultra ramp.

trail.val: breakeven needs revenue 'high-30s [m/qtr]' vs $8.6m actual; $221m cash, zero debt

forward.note: >4x revenue gap to breakeven; runway funded by $221m cash.

trail.val: power-only SAM ~$750m (2025) → ~$2.6bn (2030); ~$45/kW 800V content ($10 UHV SiC + $10–15 SiC/HV GaN + $25–30 LV GaN)
WBG market $1bn→$5bn+ (2030, Navitas-sourced); $25–35K/MW split ~evenly SiC/GaN; GaN primarily inside DC

forward.note: Largest bucket (LV GaN) is GPU-proximate where incumbents TXN/MPWR/IFX entrenched — share capture not assured.
Mgmt framing; FinTwit skeptical ('CEO TAM bullshit').
